title: Timeline of Legends media
content:
{{Top|real|ref|leg|canon=Timeline of canon media}} {{Youmay|listing [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] media by [[in-universe]] chronology|[[Wookieepedia]]'s [[timeline of galactic history/Legends|timeline of galactic history]], which lists canon events by chronological order|linebreak=1}} {{TCWRetcon}} This '''timeline''' is intended to list narrative-based [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] media by an [[in-universe]] chronology. The list includes films, television episodes, novels, [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]], short stories, [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s, and other promotional material. Placement of media in the timeline observes [[in-universe]] chronology. In order to ensure reliability, sources must ''always'' be included when providing dates. The order of chronology within the timeline adheres to the following criteria: *All entries are ordered based on the beginning of the "main events," as defined in the [[Wookieepedia:Layout_Guide#Appearances|Layout Guide]]. *Official sources for timeline placements are always given precedent over "logical" placements. *The order in which full adaptations are listed are as follows: '''Film, Novel, Junior Novel, Young Readers, Graphic Novel, Comic Book Miniseries'''. *Short story anthologies are broken down into individual titles and placed according to story-specific dates. :Ω - Original date was modified by ''The Clone Wars'' project as indicated by the ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' :† - Exact placement unknown :‡ - Exact placement needs confirmation relative to other media :Legends media that is not listed on the timeline currently is tracked [[User:C4-DE Bot/Legends Missing|here]]. __TOC__ {|{{Prettytable}} class="timeline-toggles" width="100%" |style="background-color: #5263AA; text-align: center; width: 20%;" class="film" | Film (F)

[[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' states that the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|''Living Force'']] campaign is set one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the Invasion of Naboo, an event that is dated to 32 BBY by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. In this issue, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] explains that the events of [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] happened "years ago". As a result, the events of ''Star Wars 108: Forever Crimson'' must take place at least two years after the events of ''Star Wars 50: The Crimson Forever'', which are set in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].
